moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Day
moments.blurb: The final day of The Championships, Wimbledon, sees the men's and women's singles champions crowned at SW19 today.

angles.name: Finals excitement
angles.copy: Game, set, match! It's Finals Day at Wimbledon, with new champions set to be crowned on Centre Court. Who are you backing?

angles.name: London buzz
angles.copy: The eyes of the tennis world are on SW19 today as Wimbledon concludes. The atmosphere in London is electric!

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed Closes
moments.blurb: The iconic Goodwood Festival of Speed concludes today, wrapping up four days of motorsport, celebrity appearances, and automotive showcases.

angles.name: Final day action
angles.copy: Engines revving for the last time! It's the final day of Goodwood Festival of Speed. What's been your highlight?

angles.name: Southern style
angles.copy: The South East has been buzzing with the sound of speed all weekend! Goodwood Festival of Speed wraps up today.

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins today at Royal Birkdale, with the world's best golfers competing for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Tee off time
angles.copy: Fore! Golf's oldest major, The Open Championship, tees off today at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick to lift the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Lancashire links
angles.copy: All eyes on the links of Royal Birkdale as the 154th Open Championship gets underway. A week of world-class golf awaits!

moments.title: Lewis Capaldi Headlines BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Scottish sensation Lewis Capaldi headlines American Express presents BST Hyde Park today, performing his biggest UK festival show.

angles.name: Live in London
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi brings his incredible voice and chart-topping hits to Hyde Park tonight! Who's ready for an unforgettable show?

angles.name: Capaldi hits
angles.copy: From 'Someone You Loved' to 'Wish You The Best', Lewis Capaldi is owning Hyde Park tonight! What's your favourite Capaldi track?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concludes next Sunday, July 19th, with the final match to be played in the USA.

angles.name: Countdown to final
angles.copy: Only one week until the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final! Who do you predict will be lifting the trophy next Sunday?

angles.name: World Cup fever
angles.copy: The biggest prize in football is up for grabs next weekend! Get ready for the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final.

moments.title: BBC Proms 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The world's largest classical music festival, the BBC Proms, begins its eight-week season at the Royal Albert Hall on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Classical summer
angles.copy: The BBC Proms returns this Friday, bringing eight weeks of magnificent classical music to the Royal Albert Hall and beyond!

angles.name: London culture
angles.copy: A highlight of London's summer calendar: The Proms kicks off this week! What's your favourite classical piece?

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays for many children in England and Scotland are set to begin next week, bringing a long break from school.

angles.name: Holiday countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to summer holidays is almost over for many! School's out for summer for children in England and Scotland next week.

angles.name: Family fun
angles.copy: Get ready for weeks of family fun! Summer school holidays kick off for many next week. What are your plans?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for hits like 'You're No Good' and 'Blue Bayou', turns 80 on Wednesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Happy 80th
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the iconic Linda Ronstadt this Wednesday! A true voice of a generation.

angles.name: Queen of Rock
angles.copy: Celebrating 80 years of the incredible Linda Ronstadt this week! Her voice defined an era. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Ray Toro (My Chemical Romance) 49th Birthday
moments.blurb: My Chemical Romance guitarist Ray Toro celebrates his 49th birthday on Wednesday, July 15th.

angles.name: MCR Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 49th Birthday this Wednesday to My Chemical Romance's guitar hero, Ray Toro! What's your favourite MCR riff?

angles.name: 00s icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Ray Toro, who turns 49 on Wednesday! Still rocking hard with My Chemical Romance.

moments.title: Joe Satriani's 70th Birthday
moments.blurb: Guitar virtuoso Joe Satriani, known for his instrumental rock prowess, turns 70 on Wednesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to the one and only Joe Satriani this Wednesday! The guitar legend continues to inspire.

angles.name: Satch turns 70
angles.copy: Celebrating 70 years of shredding with Joe Satriani on Wednesday! What's your favourite instrumental track?

moments.title: Olly Alexander (Years & Years) 36th Birthday
moments.blurb: Years & Years frontman and pop star Olly Alexander celebrates his 36th birthday on Wednesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Pop star birthday
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to the brilliant Olly Alexander this Wednesday! From Years & Years to solo stardom, he always delivers.

angles.name: Dance Floor King
angles.copy: Wishing Olly Alexander a fantastic 36th birthday on Wednesday! His tracks always get the party started. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland (The Police) 74th Birthday
moments.blurb: The Police drummer and co-founder Stewart Copeland turns 74 on Thursday, July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary Stewart Copeland of The Police this Thursday! Those drum beats are iconic.

angles.name: Music architect
angles.copy: Stewart Copeland, the rhythmic powerhouse behind The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday! What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Ed Kowalczyk (Live) 55th Birthday
moments.blurb: Lead singer of the band Live, Ed Kowalczyk, celebrates his 55th birthday on Thursday, July 16th.

angles.name: Live frontman
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to Ed Kowalczyk of Live this Thursday! Still belting out those anthems. What's your go-to Live song?

angles.name: 90s rock legend
angles.copy: Celebrating 55 years of Ed Kowalczyk on Thursday! The voice behind 'I Alone' and 'Lightning Crashes'.

moments.title: Luke Hemmings (5 Seconds of Summer) 30th Birthday
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of the pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, turns 30 on Thursday, July 16th.

angles.name: Pop-rock at 30
angles.copy: Happy 30th Birthday to Luke Hemmings from 5 Seconds of Summer this Thursday! Feeling young, Dumb, and Twenty-Something?

angles.name: Aussie star
angles.copy: Celebrating Luke Hemmings' 30th on Thursday! What's your favourite 5SOS hit to crank up?

moments.title: Geezer Butler (Black Sabbath) 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath bassist and lyricist Geezer Butler, a pioneer of heavy metal, turns 77 on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Metal icon
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday this Friday to the legendary Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath! The riff master still reigns supreme.

angles.name: Bass legend
angles.copy: Celebrating 77 years of Geezer Butler on Friday! His bass lines laid the foundation for heavy metal. What's your favourite Sabbath track?

moments.title: Tom Fletcher (McFly) 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: McFly frontman, guitarist, and author Tom Fletcher celebrates his 41st birthday on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: McFly star
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday this Friday to the multi-talented Tom Fletcher! From McFly hits to best-selling books, he does it all.

angles.name: 00s pop-rock
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 41st Birthday to Tom Fletcher on Friday! Still got those 'All About You' vibes?

moments.title: Kali Uchis 32nd Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer and songwriter Kali Uchis celebrates her 32nd birthday on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: R&B sensation
angles.copy: Happy 32nd Birthday this Friday to the incredible Kali Uchis! Her unique sound always stands out.

angles.name: Good vibes
angles.copy: Celebrating Kali Uchis' 32nd birthday on Friday! Her tracks bring all the good vibes. What's your favourite?
